hooks.name: example-session-init
hooks.description: Initialize session state -- creates a baseline state file so the AfterAgent hook can track orchestration progress across turns

hooks.name: example-orchestration-loop
hooks.description: Core orchestration loop driver -- inspects run state after each agent turn and decides whether to block (continue iterating) or allow (exit session). Reads prompt_response from stdin JSON; outputs block/allow/deny decision as JSON on stdout.
